FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.40sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fb115398ca0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/07 05:17:35.052073953 if (!missing(bg))

2026/07/07 05:17:36.385562158 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385569271 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385612041 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385613604 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385639212 {

2026/07/07 05:17:36.385654992 new <- list()
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385655993 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385671402 new$width <- width
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385672284 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385689326 new$height <- height
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385690468 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385706037 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/07/07 05:17:36.385718946 new$title <- title
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385730573 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385731504 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385747033 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385747985 new$version <- version
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385764356 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385765267 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385783141 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385784013 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385800323 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385801235 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385816102 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385816924 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385831642 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385832533 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385872398 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385873910 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385926388 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385927991 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385948930 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385949952 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385967495 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385968507 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385985779 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.385986651 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386004865 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386005777 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386020469 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386029065 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386040401 if (!missing(producer))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386041343 new$producer <- producer
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386058315 if (!missing(author))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386059216 new$author <- author
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386075447 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386076459 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386105954 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386107426 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386124328 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386125380 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386140843 "default"))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386155436 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386156278 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386172788 }
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386173720 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386191143 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386191984 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386209487 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386210379 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386228633 }
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386229494 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386244653 }
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386245535 else if (length(family) == 1L) {

2026/07/07 05:17:36.386261725 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386284788 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386286000 domain = NA)
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386306673 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386309098 }
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386331750 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386332512 old$family <- family
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386342470 }
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386342951 version <- old$version

2026/07/07 05:17:36.386351076 "2.0")

2026/07/07 05:17:36.386369691 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386370202 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386379459 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386379920 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386389768 domain = NA)
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386390269 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/07/07 05:17:36.386460588 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/07 05:17:36.386479203 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
